p5.post: the company have disclosed the financial irregularities earlier, the regulatory penalties would have been substantially reduced.
p5.zh: 假若公司早些披露財務違規情事，監管罰款本可大幅降低。
p5.why: 本題考假設語氣倒裝（Inverted Conditional）。原句為 If the company had disclosed...，省略 if 後，had 移至句首，形成 Had + 主詞 + 過去分詞結構，表示與過去事實相反的假設。Should 適用於現在／未來假設；Were 用於 be 動詞之倒裝；Would 不可置於倒裝句首，均不符本題語境。

p5.post: by the sudden collapse of its primary supplier, the manufacturing division was forced to suspend production indefinitely.
p5.zh: 由於主要供應商突然倒閉，製造部門被迫無限期暫停生產。
p5.why: 空格後接 by，表明主詞（製造部門）與動詞為被動關係，須使用被動分詞構句，即過去分詞 Confronted（= Being confronted）。若主詞為動作執行者，才用現在分詞 Confronting；Having confronted 表主動且時序在前；To confront 為不定詞，引介目的而非原因，語意不合。

p5.post: critics argue undermines investor confidence, has already prompted several multinational firms to reconsider their expansion plans.
p5.zh: 這部新頒布的立法——批評人士認為其削弱了投資人信心——已促使多家跨國企業重新考量擴張計畫。
p5.why: 逗號隔開的非限定關係子句必須用 which，不可用 that。此處結構為 which [critics argue] undermines...，「critics argue」為插入性報導動詞，which 本身仍是 undermines 的主詞。that 不引導非限定子句；what 引導名詞子句；whose 表所有格，均不符。

p5.pre: The arbitration clause in the original contract
p5.post: , either party retains the right to seek emergency injunctive relief from a court of competent jurisdiction.
p5.zh: 儘管原合約中有仲裁條款，任一方仍保有向管轄法院申請緊急禁制令救濟的權利。
p5.why: notwithstanding 在法律文書中常用於後置讓步（postpositive use），置於名詞片語之後，意為「儘管……」，為本題關鍵。regardless 後須接 of；nevertheless 為副詞，不能直接修飾名詞片語；despite 雖為介系詞，但須前置於名詞，不可後置，三者均不符本題結構。

p5.pre: The merger agreement stipulates that neither party may
p5.post: its rights or obligations under this contract without the express written consent of the other.
p5.zh: 併購協議規定，任一方未經對方書面明確同意，不得轉讓其在本合約下的權利或義務。
p5.why: 在合約法中，assign 是轉讓契約權利與義務的標準法律術語，常見於「assign rights or obligations」。transfer 較口語且語意籠統；delegate 僅指義務的委任，不涵蓋權利；convey 屬不動產法術語，指產權移轉，不適用於合約義務語境。

p6.title: Mandatory Compliance Training and Updated Data Governance Protocols
seg: Following the regulatory audit conducted in Q1 of this fiscal year, several procedural deficiencies in our data handling practices
. All staff with access to customer data must complete the revised compliance training module no later than June 30, 2026.

, the Office of Data Governance has comprehensively revised the internal protocols governing the collection, storage, and dissemination of personally identifiable information. These revisions are intended to align our operations with the recent amendments to the Data Protection Act and to mitigate the risk of non-compliance penalties.
Completion of the training module is

and will be tracked through the company's centralized learning management system. Employees who fail to complete the training by the stipulated deadline will have their access credentials suspended pending review by the Compliance Committee.
Direct any questions or concerns regarding the training content or enrollment process to the Compliance Helpdesk.

blanks.zh: 幾項程序缺失在我們的資料處理實務中被查出。
blanks.why: 時間副詞 in Q1 of this fiscal year 明確指出過去的特定時間點，須用簡單過去式被動 were identified。現在完成式（have been identified）通常不與特定過去時間點連用；現在式（are identified）表常態性事實；過去完成式（had been identified）需搭配另一過去基準時間點，此處語境不符。

blanks.zh: 此外，資料治理辦公室已全面修訂了相關內部規程。
blanks.why: 第二段在第一段要求完成訓練的基礎上，進一步介紹規程修訂，屬遞進補充關係，應使用 In addition（此外）。Nevertheless 表讓步轉折；Conversely 和 In contrast 均表對比，三者與段落間「累加」的邏輯關係不符。

blanks.zh: 培訓模組的完成是強制性的，並將透過公司集中式學習管理系統進行追蹤。
blanks.why: 下文明示未完訓者將被暫停系統存取權限，可知完訓具有強制性，應選 mandatory（強制的）。optional（自願的）、discretionary（自由裁量的）語意相反；provisional（暫定的）描述性質而非義務程度，均不符語境邏輯。

opts: The training program is expected to take approximately two hours to complete.
Management reserves the right to waive this requirement at its sole discretion.
Employees who completed the previous training cycle are exempt from this updated module.
This policy supersedes all prior compliance guidelines issued before 2025.
blanks.zh: 本訓練課程預計約需兩小時完成。
blanks.why: 空格後句「Direct any questions...to the Compliance Helpdesk」為收尾引導句，前方最適合插入實用操作資訊（培訓所需時間），使讀者了解預期負擔後，自然過渡至詢問管道。B「豁免權保留」、C「前次結訓者免修」、D「取代舊規」均引入新政策議題，與後句銜接不自然。
